title: Broad Momentum Drawdown Patience Guard
hypothesis: A slower drawdown-penalized momentum branch can test whether the guarded momentum family fails mainly on timing noise rather than concentration once sector and benchmark-bucket caps are already in place.
why_different_from_retired: The earlier drawdown-guarded momentum branch focused on concentration controls, while this branch keeps those controls and materially changes the holding cadence and recycle timing.
This is also distinct from the beta-aware bucket-guard path because it keeps drawdown-penalized scoring instead of shifting back to raw beta-aware ranking.
success_criteria: The drawdown patience-guard seed must pass the existing validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion policy without exceptions before it can move toward paper-trade preparation.
If it fails, it must still produce enough evidence to decide whether slower guarded drawdown momentum deserves any future backlog space.

stop_conditions.when: The drawdown patience-guard seed passes validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion rules under the current policy.
The seed records a terminal promotion decision and still fails the policy, especially on benchmark-relative split or walk-forward evidence.

bootstrap.program_title: Broad Momentum Drawdown Patience Guard Program
bootstrap.objective: Run one slower drawdown-penalized momentum branch so the family can test whether the engine needs longer holding patience once concentration guardrails are already in place.
bootstrap.branch_rationale: The sector-guard branch answers whether concentration controls help drawdown-aware momentum. This follow-up asks whether the remaining weakness is timing noise rather than concentration alone.
positive_hypotheses: Longer holding windows can reduce turnover noise that may still be washing out the guarded drawdown signal.
Keeping one benchmark-bucket slot while slowing recycle timing can preserve concentration discipline without overfitting to short-horizon reversals.

seed_stack.label: Drawdown sector-guard control
seed_stack.rationale: Reference control for the first guarded drawdown momentum branch.

seed_stack.label: Drawdown patience-guard seed
seed_stack.rationale: Repo-backed slower drawdown-penalized branch using longer holding cadence and tighter benchmark-bucket balance.

campaign_path.label: Momentum Drawdown Patience-Guard Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Execute the slower guarded drawdown momentum family and decide whether it should be promoted or retired.
